Class ArrayUtil

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.util.java.ArrayUtil
public final class ArrayUtil extends Object
Provides static methods to work with arrays.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static int[]
    add(int[] array, int toAdd)
    Adds the given element to the existing array.

    Adds the given element to the existing array.

    Adds the given elements to the existing array.

  • Method Details

    • search

      public static <T extends @Nullable Object> @Nullable T search(T[] array, Predicate<T> filter)
      Searches an element in the given Iterable instance. Returns the first element that satisfies the predicate.
      Parameters:
      array - The instance to search in.
      filter - The filter to select an element.
      Returns:
      The found element or null if no element was found.

    • addAll

      public static <T extends @Nullable Object> T[] addAll(T[] array, T[] toAdd)

      Adds the given elements to the existing array. The result is a new array that contains the other elements in the end.

      Attention: It is not possible to use this method with two null parameters. In this case is an IllegalArgumentException thrown.

      Parameters:
      array - The array to add to.
      toAdd - The elements to add.
      Returns:
      The new created array.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - Both parameters are null.

    • addAll

      public static <T extends @Nullable Object> T[] addAll(T[] array, T[] toAdd, Class<?> newArrayType)

      Adds the given elements to the existing array. The result is a new array that contains the other elements in the end.

      Attention: It is not possible to use this method with two null parameters. In this case is an IllegalArgumentException thrown.

      Parameters:
      array - The array to add to.
      toAdd - The elements to add.
      newArrayType - The type of the new array.
      Returns:
      The new created array.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - Both parameters are null.

    • add

      public static <T extends @Nullable Object> T[] add(T[] array, T toAdd)

      Adds the given element to the existing array. The result is a new array that contains one more element.

      Attention: It is not possible to use this method with two null parameters. In this case is an IllegalArgumentException thrown.

      Parameters:
      array - The array to extend.
      toAdd - The element to add.
      Returns:
      The new created array with one more element.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - Both parameters are null.

    • add

      public static int[] add(int[] array, int toAdd)

      Adds the given element to the existing array. The result is a new array that contains one more element.

      Parameters:
      array - The array to extend.
      toAdd - The element to add.
      Returns:
      The new created array with one more element.

    • insert

      public static <T extends @Nullable Object> T[] insert(T[] array, T toInsert, int index)

      Inserts the given element at the given index to the existing array. The result is a new array that contains one more element.

      Parameters:
      array - The array to extend.
      toInsert - The element to insert.
      index - The index to insert the element at.
      Returns:
      The new created array with one more element.

    • contains

      public static <T extends @Nullable Object> boolean contains(T[] array, T toSearch)
      Checks if the given array contains the element to search.
      Type Parameters:
      T - The type of the array.
      Parameters:
      array - The array.
      toSearch - The element to search.
      Returns:
      true if the array contains the element or false if not or if the array is null.

    • indexOf

      public static <T extends @Nullable Object> int indexOf(T[] array, T toSearch)
      Returns the first index in the given array that contains the element to search. The equality is computed via the comparator. Objects are equal if the comparison result is 0.
      Parameters:
      array - The array to search in.
      toSearch - The element to search.
      Returns:
      The first index in the array that contains the element to search or -1 if the elment is not containd in the array.

    • remove

      public static <T extends @Nullable Object> T @NonNull [] remove(@Nullable T @NonNull [] array, T toRemove)
      Removes all occurrences from toRemove in the array. The equality is computed via the comparator. Objects are equal if the comparison result is 0.
      Parameters:
      array - The array to remove from.
      toRemove - The element to remove.
      Returns:
      A copy of the array without the element toRemove.

    • toString

      public static <T extends @Nullable Object> String toString(T[] array)
      Converts the given array into a String.
      Parameters:
      array - The array to convert.
      Returns:
      The array as String.

    • toString

      public static <T extends @Nullable Object> String toString(T[] array, String separator)
      Converts the given array into a String.
      Parameters:
      array - The array to convert.
      separator - The separator between to array elements.
      Returns:
      The array as String.

    • toString

      public static String toString(int[] array)
      Converts the given array into a String.
      Parameters:
      array - The array to convert.
      Returns:
      The array as String.

    • toString

      public static String toString(int[] array, String separator)
      Converts the given array into a String.
      Parameters:
      array - The array to convert.
      separator - The separator between to array elements.
      Returns:
      The array as String.

    • isEmpty

      public static <T extends @Nullable Object> boolean isEmpty(T[] array)
      Checks if the given array is empty.
      Parameters:
      array - The array to check.
      Returns:
      true array is empty or null, false array is not empty.
